Interest Name: Meta Ads Interest Targeting Database - Curated for Performance Marketing

Compiled from eachspy.com Meta Interest Finder API across 60 keyword categories. Cleaned to remove entertainment/noise (movies, TV shows, bands, video games, universities, individual athletes). Focused on: industries, behaviors, lifestyles, brands, professional categories, demographics, activities, cultural interests. Sorted by audience size descending. Remove duplicates by Interest Name.
